title: 🎨 Palette: Add typing hidden hint to password prompt
body:
## 💡 What
Added `(typing will be hidden)` to the password prompt in the CLI.

## 🎯 Why
In CLI environments, users often experience anxiety or assume the terminal has frozen when typing sensitive inputs like passwords, as no characters are echoed to the screen. Explicitly communicating that typing is hidden mitigates this confusion.

## 📸 Before/After
**Before:**
`Enter Control D API Token: `

**After:**
`Enter Control D API Token: (typing will be hidden) `

## ♿ Accessibility
Improves clarity for all users, explicitly preventing confusion around hidden input states.
head: chore/ux-hidden-input
